What is Section 87A rebate for FY 2025-2: Section 87A rebate is a tax benefit available to taxpayers who have income from business or profession. The rebate is available only if the total income from business or profession is less than Rs. 50 lakhs. The rebate is 20% of the total income from business or profession. For FY 2025-26, the maximum rebate is Rs. 10 lakhs. The rebate is available only once in a lifetime.
